snapshots.notes: KTC scraped in SF+TEP mode (?sf=1&tep=1). Crowd values natively include both. Do NOT re-apply.

snapshots.scoring_context: dynasty SF TEP (IDPTradeCalc offense+IDP values via API+autocomplete)
snapshots.notes: IDPTradeCalc values. API returns IDP players (DL/LB/DB). Offensive players (QB/RB/WR/TE) are obtained via autocomplete search using the KTC player pool as the target list. Both offense and IDP values are exported to the CSV. Acts as the default IDP backbone for translating position-only sources.

snapshots.scoring_context: dynasty superflex IDP (DLF expert consensus, full-board DL/LB/DB)
snapshots.notes: DLF full-board IDP rankings (185 players). Ranks are the average of three expert rankers (FrankG, Jason K, Justin T). Ingested as a rank signal via the scraper bridge; the contract loader inverts rank to a synthetic value so the ordinal sort matches DLF's published order. Not a backbone source — IDPTradeCalc remains authoritative.

snapshots.scoring_context: dynasty superflex (FantasyPros expert consensus ECR, QB/RB/WR/TE)
snapshots.notes: FantasyPros Dynasty Superflex expert consensus (~250 QB/RB/WR/TE players). Ingested as a rank signal; the contract loader inverts rank to a synthetic value. Standard SF board — no TE premium. Frontend tepMultiplier boost applies.
warnings: Scraper bridge: file loaded but produced no usable rows — fantasyProsSf.csv

snapshots.scoring_context: dynasty superflex (Dynasty Daddy SF values, community crowd-sourced)
snapshots.notes: Dynasty Daddy SF trade values via JSON API (?market=14). Standard SF scoring — no TE premium. Values are crowd-sourced.

snapshots.scoring_context: dynasty superflex (Flock Fantasy expert consensus, multi-expert averaged ranks)
snapshots.notes: Flock Fantasy SF dynasty rankings via JSON API (?format=superflex). Expert consensus averaged ranks. Standard SF — no TE premium.

snapshots.scoring_context: dynasty superflex (FootballGuys 6-expert consensus, offense half of the mixed dynasty PDF)
snapshots.notes: FootballGuys dynasty rankings — offense half of the user-managed PDF export, parsed + split + dense-ranked by scripts/parse_footballguys_pdf.py.  6-expert consensus covering QB/RB/WR/TE.

snapshots.scoring_context: dynasty IDP (FootballGuys 3-expert consensus, IDP half of the mixed dynasty PDF)
snapshots.notes: FootballGuys dynasty rankings — IDP half of the same PDF export.  3-expert consensus covering DE/DT/LB/CB/S.  Translates through the shared-market IDP ladder.
